Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Series Lead | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers won Game 2 of their first-round NBA playoff series against the Toronto Raptors on Monday, led by Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points), extending their playoff winning streak against Toronto to 12 games.[4]
